win_condition: First player to reach 10 victory points on their turn wins immediately.
tiebreaker: No tiebreaker needed; first to 10 on their turn wins.

categories.label: Settlements
categories.description: 1 victory point per settlement on the board.

categories.label: Cities
categories.description: 2 victory points per city on the board.

categories.label: Longest Road
categories.description: 2 victory points for holding the Longest Road card (5+ continuous road segments).

categories.label: Largest Army
categories.description: 2 victory points for holding the Largest Army card (3+ knight cards played).

categories.label: Victory Point Cards
categories.description: 1 victory point per VP development card held.
